name: System Prompt Building
description: context.ts collects OS, shell, git, and user context. systemPrompt.ts:buildEffectiveSystemPrompt() assembles final prompt, calling getCoordinatorSystemPrompt() when coordinator mode is active (via COORDINATOR_MODE feature flag).

content: Always add explicit ignore-if-off-topic instruction when injecting RAG content: 'Only use this research if DIRECTLY relevant. If the topic does not match, IGNORE these findings. Do NOT mix information from unrelated topics.'
